steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The student’s goal is to specify when Ur formed. The strongest clue in the notes is the explicit time provided for Ur’s formation: “Ur formed about 3.1 billion years ago.” This direct temporal phrase is the deciding factor.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice B restates the exact timing (“3.1 billion years ago”) and directly links it to Ur.

The other three either describe general background information (A, C, D) or introduce unrelated details about Gondwana and the supercontinent cycle.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
